title: Aethera 시네마틱 히어로 (라이트)
description: 라이트 테마 풀스크린 히어로. 비디오가 페이지 하단에서 올라오며 상하 흰색 페이드로 자연스럽게 섞임. requestAnimationFrame 기반 페이드인·페이드아웃 루프 내장. Instrument Serif × Inter 폰트, 검정 pill 버튼 CTA. ChatGPT·Gemini에 붙여넣기만으로 단일 HTML 파일 생성.
prompt:
Create a single standalone HTML file (no build tools, no npm, no frameworks). The entire page must work by opening the .html file directly in a browser.

OUTPUT REQUIREMENT:
- One complete .html file only
- All CSS inside <style> tags in <head>
- All JavaScript inside <script> tags at the bottom of <body>
- No external CSS files, no Tailwind CDN, no JavaScript frameworks
- Only allowed external resource: Google Fonts via <link>

---

DESIGN: Aethera — Cinematic Hero Page (Light Theme)

FONTS (load via Google Fonts link tag):
  Instrument Serif (italic variant included: :ital@0;1)
  Inter 400, 500 (body text)

COLOR THEME (light):
  --color-bg: #ffffff
  --color-text: #000000
  --color-muted: #6f6f6f

CSS reset: *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
body: font-family Inter; background var(--color-bg); color var(--color-text); overflow-x hidden

---

VIDEO BACKGROUND:
  Container class .video-layer:
    position: absolute; inset: auto 0 0 0; top: 300px; z-index: 0
    (video starts 300px from top — occupies lower portion of page)
  <video id='bg-video'> element: muted playsinline preload='auto' (NO autoplay attr — JS controls it)
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; transition: none
  Source: https://d8j0ntlcm91z4.cloudfront.net/user_38xzZboKViGWJOttwIXH07lWA1P/hf_20260328_083109_283f3553-e28f-428b-a723-d639c617eb2b.mp4

GRADIENT OVERLAYS on .video-layer (::before and ::after pseudo-elements):
  ::before: top: 0; height: 40%; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #ffffff, transparent)
  ::after:  bottom: 0; height: 40%; background: linear-gradient(to top, #ffffff, transparent)
  Both: position absolute; left 0; right 0; z-index 1; pointer-events none

---

ANIMATIONS:
  @keyframes fade-rise { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(20px); } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); } }
  .animate-fade-rise         { animation: fade-rise 0.8s ease-out both; }
  .animate-fade-rise-delay   { animation: fade-rise 0.8s 0.2s ease-out both; }
  .animate-fade-rise-delay-2 { animation: fade-rise 0.8s 0.4s ease-out both; }

---

NAVIGATION BAR (nav element):
  position: relative; z-index: 10; width: 100%
  Inner container (.nav-inner): max-width 80rem; margin auto; padding 1.5rem 2rem;
    display flex; align-items center; justify-content space-between
  Logo (.logo): text 'Aethera' + superscript R symbol (registered trademark)
    font-family Instrument Serif; font-size 1.875rem; letter-spacing -0.025em; color #000000
  Nav links (.nav-menu): hide on mobile below 640px
    Home (active, color #000000), Studio, About, Journal, Reach Us (color #6f6f6f, hover #000000)
    font-family Inter; font-size 0.875rem; gap 2rem
  CTA button (.btn-nav): text 'Begin Journey'
    background #000000; color #ffffff; border none; border-radius 9999px
    padding 0.625rem 1.5rem; font-size 0.875rem; cursor pointer; hover scale(1.03)

---

HERO SECTION (section.hero):
  position: relative; z-index: 10
  Layout: display flex; flex-direction column; align-items center; justify-content center; text-align center
  Padding: padding-top calc(8rem - 75px); padding-bottom 10rem; padding-left/right 1.5rem
  H1 (.hero-headline):
    Text: 'Beyond [italic-muted]silence,[/italic-muted] we build [italic-muted]the eternal.[/italic-muted]'
    Italic muted words use <em> tag styled with: color #6f6f6f; font-style italic
    font-family Instrument Serif; font-weight 400; font-size clamp(3rem, 8vw, 6rem)
    line-height 0.95; letter-spacing -2.46px; color #000000; max-width 80rem
    apply .animate-fade-rise
  Description (.hero-desc):
    Text: 'Building platforms for brilliant minds, fearless makers, and thoughtful souls. Through the noise, we craft digital havens for deep work and pure flows.'
    font-family Inter; font-size clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.125rem); color #6f6f6f
    max-width 42rem; margin-top 2rem; line-height 1.65
    apply .animate-fade-rise-delay
  CTA button (.btn-hero):
    Text: 'Begin Journey'
    background #000000; color #ffffff; border none; border-radius 9999px
    padding 1.25rem 3.5rem; font-size 1rem; margin-top 3rem; cursor pointer; hover scale(1.03)
    apply .animate-fade-rise-delay-2

---

JAVASCRIPT — Video Fade Loop (place in <script> at bottom of body):
  Implement custom fade-in/fade-out loop logic WITHOUT using the video's loop attribute.
  FADE_DURATION = 0.5 (seconds)
  Use requestAnimationFrame for continuous monitoring:
    function tick():
      if video.duration is NaN or 0: reschedule tick and return
      t = video.currentTime; d = video.duration
      if t < FADE_DURATION: video.style.opacity = t / FADE_DURATION  (fade in)
      else if t > d - FADE_DURATION: video.style.opacity = (d - t) / FADE_DURATION  (fade out)
      else: video.style.opacity = 1
      reschedule tick
  function startLoop(): set opacity 0, reset currentTime to 0, call video.play(), start tick()
  Listen for 'ended' event: set opacity 0, setTimeout(startLoop, 100)
  Listen for 'canplay' event (once): call startLoop()
  Also call startLoop() immediately as fallback

---

LAYOUT RULES:
  Page wrapper (.scene): position relative; min-height 100vh; width 100%; overflow hidden; background var(--color-bg)
  Layer order: video-layer (z-0) → nav (z-10) → hero section (z-10)
  Minimalist and clean — the video blends into white, content floats above
  No dark overlays, no glass effects — pure light aesthetic
